Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for user-imported neural network topology
Correction: The system shall accept user-imported neural network topologies in the Open Neural Network eXchange (ONNX) format.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported image formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV file format.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for argument validity checks
Correction: The system shall check arguments for validity based on compatibility with the selected neural network and hardware components.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum height and width for input images
Correction: The height and width of input images should be at least 224x224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the compatibility requirements for imported neural networks
Correction: Imported neural network topology should be compatible with the specified hardware and should be in ONNX format.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: Inference results and diagnostic data shall be provided in a structured JSON format.

Label: /TC-INF-10/
Issue: Does not specify the expected format of the inference result
Correction: The inference result should include a confidence score, latency, hardware information, and the identifier of the neural network.

Label: /TC-ERR-10/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for an invalid neural network
Correction: An invalid neural network is one that is not in the ONNX format or is incompatible with the selected hardware.

Label: /TC-ERR-30/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for an invalid image
Correction: An invalid image is one that is not in the supported formats (JPEG, JPG, PNG) or does not meet the minimum size requirements.
